title: telemetry-otel — subprocessors
description: Telemetry data (span attributes, metric labels) leaves the application via OTLP. Where the collector is third-party-hosted, that vendor is a subprocessor. Self-hosted collectors on our infra are NOT subprocessors.

subprocessors.name: DataDog
subprocessors.when_engaged: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT points at datadoghq.com or a local dd-agent forwarder

notes: The choice of subprocessor is deployment-specific. Multiple can be configured via a fan-out collector (OTel Collector `otlp` receiver → multiple `otlp` exporters).
SelfHosted collectors (Grafana Alloy, OTel Collector on our own K8s) are NOT subprocessors per GDPR Art. 28 because we control them.
